patches.after_text: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
patches.ground_span: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
patches.expected_redline_text: Delete any fixed-term employment guarantee and state that employment is at will and may end at any time by either party.

patches.before_text: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company.
patches.after_text: Cause extends to the identified minor nonmaterial event after a 15-day cure period even though it does not materially breach a duty, policy, law, or agreement and does not materially harm Company. Company provides the written Cause notice within 1 days after its determination and offers an investigation meeting within 8 days.
patches.ground_span: Cause extends to the identified minor nonmaterial event after a 15-day cure period even though it does not materially breach a duty, policy, law, or agreement and does not materially harm Company. Company provides the written Cause notice within 1 days after its determination and offers an investigation meeting within 8 days.
patches.expected_redline_text: Cause includes material failure to perform duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of the agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company.

patches.before_text: Executive will not engage in outside employment, consulting, board service, or business activity that conflicts with Company's business or Executive's duties unless Company gives prior written approval.
patches.after_text: Executive may engage in outside employment, consulting, board service, or business activity if Executive determines it can be managed alongside Company responsibilities.
patches.ground_span: Executive may engage in outside employment, consulting, board service, or business activity if Executive determines it can be managed alongside Company responsibilities.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: During employment and for 36 months after separation, Executive will not provide services to any business that competes with Company anywhere in North America.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: During employment and for 36 months after separation, Executive will not provide services to any business that competes with Company anywhere in North America.
patches.expected_redline_text: During employment and for six months after separation, Executive will not provide substantially similar executive services to a business unit that directly competes with a Company product or service for which Executive had material responsibility, but only to the extent enforceable under applicable law.

plant_position.fallback_text: During employment and for six months after separation, Executive will not provide substantially similar executive services to a business unit that directly competes with a Company product or service for which Executive had material responsibility, but only to the extent enforceable under applicable law.

patches.before_text: Executive is eligible for a target annual bonus equal to 40% of base salary. Any bonus is discretionary unless a written bonus plan approved by Company states objective metrics, approval requirements, and payment timing, and Executive must remain employed through the payment date unless the written plan states otherwise.
patches.after_text: Executive is eligible for a target bonus of 30% only under a signed written plan stating objective metrics, approval requirements, and payment timing. Company reviews reported metrics every 60 days and processes an approved payment within 10 days after certification.
patches.ground_span: Executive is eligible for a target bonus of 30% only under a signed written plan stating objective metrics, approval requirements, and payment timing. Company reviews reported metrics every 60 days and processes an approved payment within 10 days after certification.

plant_position.fallback_text: Executive is eligible for a target annual bonus equal to 40% of base salary. Any bonus is discretionary unless a written bonus plan approved by Company states objective metrics, approval requirements, and payment timing, and Executive must remain employed through the payment date unless the written plan states otherwise.

patches.before_text: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. Those reviews do not guarantee any future bonus, equity grant, vesting change, title, duties, authority, or continued employment.
patches.after_text: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. Those reviews do not guarantee any future bonus, equity grant, vesting change, title, duties, authority, or continued employment. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
